response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates excellent software engineering fundamentals, strong architecture skills, and 19 years of development experience, there is a critical mismatch with the core technical requirements. The role demands deep C++ expertise and industrial systems knowledge (IEC 62443, MQTT, industrial protocols); the candidate has only 6 months of focused C++ experience and a career trajectory entirely in web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React). The necessary skills in networking, multi-threading, and industrial cybersecurity are not evident, making this a significant career pivot rather than a natural fit.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with 19 years of development experience including OOP, architecture design, and mentoring
Proven ability to design complex event-driven and distributed systems (GISCollective, Dunnhumby microservices)
Excellent software craftsmanship culture with strong TDD and testing practices
concerns: Critical gap: only 6 months of focused C++ experience at National Instruments; role requires deep C++ and STL expertise
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation, IoT, industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA)
Career entirely focused on web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS); lacks evidence of systems programming, networking, multi-threading, or high-performance computing at production scale

key_factors.factor: Missing industrial domain and cybersecurity knowledge
Strong software engineering fundamentals and architecture skills
